title: BLADO Coir Matting Natural Coir Entrance Door Mat Indoor Outdoor - Non-Slip Heavy Duty Floor Door mat with thick Bristle & Rubber Back (Brown, 60 x 90 cm)
features: 【 Entrance Door Mat 】: Our Versatile door mat perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Tailor the length to fit your doorway precisely, enhancing your entrance’s aesthetic.

【 Versatile and Functional 】: Coir matting cut to size suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, and effortlessly trimmable, perfect for high-traffic areas such as entranceways, doorways, and patios, offering reliable performance in all weather conditions.

【 Thick Coir Door Mats 】: 𝟩𝗆𝗆 thick mat crafted from tough coir bristles that excel at containing stains and mud. The natural fibres provide a wire texture ideal for effectively cleaning shoes and boots, ensuring your floors stay clean and inviting.

【 Durable and Non-Slip 】: Our Door mats indoor heavy duty made with natural coir bristles and a rubber backing, this mat stays in place and effectively traps dirt and moisture to keep your floors clean.
【 Easy to Maintain 】: Simply shake, brush, or vacuum the coir mat to remove dirt and debris. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting performance without fading or shedding.
